findings.description: The email address larry.frost@ncdenr.gov in the digital signature block is plain text in the PDF but has been wrapped in a mailto hyperlink in the HTML, constituting link injection.
findings.evidence: PDF shows: 'email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov' as plain text within the digital signature certification block. HTML converts to: 'email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov'

findings.description: The handwritten signature image next to Larry Frost's name on page 1 of the PDF is missing from the HTML. Signatures are substantive images that authenticate the document.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a visible handwritten/cursive signature graphic adjacent to 'Larry Frost, Engineer'. The HTML has no tag for this signature, only the digital signature text metadata.
